questions.q: On Day 4 of the 2026 Winter Paralympics, which Canadian athlete won her 10th career Paralympic medal with a bronze in the women's standing cross-country sprint?

U.S. President Donald Trump sparked social media discussion today by referring to Prime Minister Mark Carney by what title in a Truth Social post?
